properties.name: authorization.enabled
properties.description: Whether the authorization auto-configuration activates and wires the reference AuthorizationService, policy, rule repository, audit sink, and clock (each individually replaceable via @ConditionalOnMissingBean).

properties.name: authorization.demo-policy.enabled
properties.description: Whether to install the permissive in-memory showcase policy. Local demonstrations only; production applications should provide a PolicyRuleRepository.
